target: 16. Because Ajiro Was There

If only I had that right eye…
It might actually be possible, you know.
Going back in time and redoing it…
July 24
Shinpei Ajiro

(Two days have passed since then.
I tried hard to stop people from coming to the island,
but…)

(Not only did I get no results,
but the number of visitors ended up increasing more than before)

(And so, I ended up facing the festival day
without being able to do anything)

Since she usually comes,
it would've been fine if she didn't send me off.

There are more festival tourists than usual.
It's better to be careful.

Anyway… I'm sorry.
I told you not to go to the festival.
Hmm, it's fine either way.

Since she's not around,
I wasn't planning to go to the festival alone anyway.

Plus Tokiko also said,
"Then let's play together at home."
Well, Sou didn't seem to be satisfied at all.
I'll talk to Sou, Mio, and Tokiko properly tomorrow.

It's a promise.
See you later.
Yeah, give my regards to Tokiko and Sou.

(Though I can only do this much…
keeping the people around me from going to the festival…)

(If I let Mio and Sou go into that tragedy,
it would be worse than keeping them here.)

(But it's not over yet.
If I can't stop today's events,
then… there's no way to avoid people's sacrifices anymore.)
(The only way is to defeat the Shadow's master!)

(The fireworks haven't started yet.
There's still some time before then.)
Phew…

(Though I've made up my mind…
the only weapon I have is a single chef's knife.)

(Against an enemy with such inhuman physical abilities,
this is really… insufficient.)

(But… even if I'm going to die,
I want to at least strike back once.)
And… next time, for sure!
Yaaahhh!!!

Wahhh!!!?
Run away, you guys!!!

A scream…?
Has the massacre already started!?

Why!?
The fireworks and the live show haven't even started yet!
(Anyway, I have to go!!)
Yaaahhh!!!

(The audience being attacked by the four-armed shadow…
the bodies piling up…)
(It's different from…)
…I messed up, I took it off!
